name: megapowers
description: An opinionated, à-la-carte collection of skills, plugins, and hooks for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Antigravity. One maintainer's workflow, not a universal framework.

plugins.name: megapowers
plugins.description: The workflow core: process skills for brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, review, worktrees, and subagent orchestration. A restyled fork of Superpowers.

plugins.name: mega-go
plugins.description: Greenfield Go: an opinionated stack picker plus idiomatic Go patterns.

plugins.name: mega-python
plugins.description: Greenfield Python: an opinionated stack picker (uv, ruff, pyright, pytest, FastAPI) plus idiomatic Python patterns.

plugins.name: mega-ts
plugins.description: Greenfield TypeScript: an opinionated stack picker (pnpm, strict tsconfig, vitest, Hono, zod) plus idiomatic TypeScript patterns.

plugins.name: mega-orchestration
plugins.description: Decide the structure (inline, fan-out, delegate, best-of-N, council, autonomous run), route each role to the best model, verify across vendors, and gate irreversible actions.

plugins.name: mega-guardrails
plugins.description: Safety hooks and dev tooling: block destructive commands, auto-format on save, and a rich statusline (Linux-only, opt-in).

plugins.name: mega-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend design guidance: distinctive visual direction, typography, layout, and UX copy that don't read as templated defaults.

plugins.name: golang-patterns
plugins.description: Idiomatic Go patterns as a standalone skill: functional options, small interfaces, DI, worker pools/context, error wrapping. Derived from Everything Claude Code (MIT, (c) 2026 Affaan Mustafa). Also in the mega-go bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: python-patterns
plugins.description: Idiomatic Python patterns as a standalone skill: typing, error handling, async correctness, a non-deadlocking worker pool, testing. Also in the mega-python bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: typescript-patterns
plugins.description: Idiomatic TypeScript patterns as a standalone skill: discriminated unions, result-vs-throw, promise/async correctness, no floating promises, testing. Also in the mega-ts bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Explore intent, requirements, and design before any creative or implementation work begins. Also in the megapowers bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: systematic-debugging
plugins.description: Diagnose bugs, test failures, and unexpected behavior by root cause before proposing a fix. Also in the megapowers bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: test-driven-development
plugins.description: Drive any feature or bugfix by writing failing tests before the implementation code. Also in the megapowers bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: writing-plans
plugins.description: Turn a spec or requirements into an explicit, reviewable plan before touching code. Also in the megapowers bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: writing-skills
plugins.description: Create, edit, and verify Claude Code skills before deployment. Also in the megapowers bundle; install one, not both.

plugins.name: multi-agent-delegation
plugins.description: Route work to the right model: Codex for plan/code review, small implementation, and visual/browser work; a vendor-neutral browser delegate (playwright-cli + a vision-capable model) for the cross-vendor visual_verify pass and browser fallback. Provider-agnostic and config-driven. Also in the mega-orchestration bundle; install one, not both.
